T1: Collect remaining context

H-01 provider red-team suite (T5) surfaced two REAL fail-closed gaps in the W14 adapter (stalled-body abort throws uncaught instead of yielding cancelled; zero-byte 200 body silently yields zero events). User approved fixing them in-flow. AC1/AC5 amended to permit a minimal additive fail-closed fix to anthropic-provider.ts (guarded body read + empty-body terminal error) and flip the [FINDING] tests to assert fail-closed.
